title: oblivia ceronii
intro: Oblivia ceronii, also known as the "forget-me-not tree," is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Oblivia ceronii include treating fever, wounds, and skin infections, as well as alleviating digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Oblivia ceronii can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their effectiveness.
